name: Mei Kwei Tao (Pickled Peaches in Red Rose Petals)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, vinegar, water, and salt in a large pot. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Simmer for 20 minutes until the sugar has dissolved completely.
3. Carefully remove peaches from the syrup using tongs or a slotted spoon.
4. Rinse each peach under cold water for three minutes.
5. Gently pat dry with a clean towel.
6. Attach one red rose to the stem of each peach.
7. Place four cloves through the rose and onto the peach.
8. Reheat the syrup if needed, then simmer gently until the peaches are tender.
